name: S & T Transportation
recent_news: No M&A or news identified; only a Yelp listing as 'Transportation' at 904 S Magnolia St, McComb MS (unclaimed). Unrelated S&T Transport Inc (USDOT 1300494) is a freight carrier and not the same entity.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (3 employees, ~$159K rev) and no evidence of a school district contract or fleet of yellow buses. Not a meaningful Summit tuck-in; likely a sole-proprietor NEMT/special-needs van operator.

name: Texas Accessibility Speclsts
recent_news: No news identified; listed on Yellow Pages under Special Needs Transportation / Disability Services at 150 N Harbin Dr, Stephenville TX (phone discrepancy: (817) 217-2992 on YP vs (254) 968-3490 in source data). Note: 'Texas Accessibility Specialists' is also the name of an unrelated TDLR-registered building plan review firm (tx-access.com) - this transport entity is distinct.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (3 employees, ~$155K rev) special-needs/disability transport. No evidence of a school district yellow-bus route contract. Too small to be a Summit tuck-in; potential SPED-route capacity only if larger than disclosed.

name: Because Wee Care
recent_news: No web presence located; address (4880 Castle Dargan Dr, Country Club Hills) is residential. Name does not appear in IL DHS, daycare directories, or transportation listings. Possibly a home-based childcare or single-vehicle transport, or defunct.
fit_notes: No evidence of a yellow-bus or SPED route contract with any IL district. At ~$151K rev and 3 employees from a home address, this is not an institutional school-bus operator and is not a viable Summit tuck-in.

name: Precious Stone Limousine
recent_news: No M&A or growth news located. Listed as a limousine service in Chicago's South Shore; not in ILLBA member directory results or Chicago school transport listings (Cook-Illinois, Latino Express, Sunrise, etc. dominate CPS routes).
fit_notes: This is a limousine operator, not a school-bus contractor. Wrong vehicle class and scale (3 employees, ~$151K rev) for a Summit tuck-in; school-bus platform synergies are minimal.

name: Olympic Taxi Svc
recent_news: No active web presence found. Sun Taxi (mysuntaxi.com) is now the dominant Sequim/Port Angeles taxi operator, with Uber having launched in Port Angeles; Olympic Taxi may be dormant/defunct. Sequim School District manages its own bus transportation.
fit_notes: Taxi service operating from a PO Box - not a yellow-bus contractor for Sequim SD (district runs its own fleet). Sub-scale and wrong service type; not a viable Summit tuck-in target.
